# Tempo – Focus Timer & Pomodoro Productivity App

> Tempo is a free, open-source Pomodoro-style focus timer web app built with Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS. It helps users stay productive through customizable work-break cycles, task management, daily session goals, and motivational quotes.

## Features

- **Circular Timer**: A visual countdown timer with smooth animations for work and break sessions.
- **Customizable Durations**: Set your own work duration, break duration, and inactivity threshold.
- **Task Tracking**: Create, start, complete, and delete tasks. Track sessions and time spent per task.
- **Daily Goals & Streaks**: Set a daily session goal and track your streak of consecutive productive days.
- **Auto-Start**: Optionally auto-start the next session when a break ends.
- **Notifications**: Browser notifications when a session or break completes.
- **Motivational Quotes**: Rotating inspirational quotes displayed during sessions.
- **Dark Mode**: Supports light and dark themes via system preference.
- **Local Storage Persistence**: All data (settings, tasks, progress, streaks) persists in the browser.

## Tech Stack

- Next.js (App Router)
- React 19
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS 4
- Local Storage for data persistence

## Architecture

- `src/app/layout.tsx` – Root layout with SEO metadata.
- `src/app/page.tsx` – Main single-page app with timer, controls, tasks, and settings.
- `src/components/CircularTimer.tsx` – SVG-based circular countdown display.
- `src/components/TimerControls.tsx` – Start, pause, and reset buttons.
- `src/components/DailyProgress.tsx` – Daily goal progress bar and streak display.
- `src/components/SettingsPanel.tsx` – Settings modal for durations, goals, notifications.
- `src/components/TaskList.tsx` – Task creation, listing, and time tracking.
- `src/hooks/useTimer.ts` – Core timer logic hook (work/break cycles, callbacks).
- `src/lib/types.ts` – TypeScript type definitions (Settings, Task, TimerStatus, etc.).
- `src/lib/quotes.ts` – Array of motivational quotes.
- `src/lib/storage/` – Local storage utilities for tasks, settings, and daily progress.

## URL

- Homepage: https://usetempo.app
